The '''''Celador Sash''''' was a twin-hulled [[Freighter/Legends|freighter]] donated to the [[New Jedi Order]]. The parents of its original owner were once saved by [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan Kenobi]] and in gratitude the [[Starship/Legends|ship]] was gifted to the [[Jedi Praxeum|Academy]] some time before [[12 ABY/Legends|12 ABY]]. Although it was outdated by that time, it was kept in a good state of repairs. It was equipped with a modified [[Navigation computer/Legends|navicomputer]] that included a 3D [[Holomap/Legends|holomap]].

[[Kyp Durron]] and [[Dorsk 82]] flew the ship on their mission to [[Corbos]].

==Appearances==
*[[Jedi Academy: Leviathan 1|''Jedi Academy: Leviathan'' 1]]
